Sun.description: Represents identity, ego, self-expression and vitality. The Sun is the core of your being, governing willpower, authority, and life purpose.
Sun.remedies: Offer water to the Sun at sunrise. Chant Aditya Hridayam. Wear Ruby gemstone.

Moon.description: Represents emotions, inner world, intuition and nurturing energy. The Moon governs your mind, feelings, and emotional responses.
Moon.remedies: Meditate during full moon. Wear Pearl gemstone. Offer milk to Shiva Linga on Mondays.

Mars.description: Represents ambition, drive, assertiveness and conflict. Mars is the warrior planet that fuels courage, energy, and determination.
Mars.remedies: Chant Hanuman Chalisa on Tuesdays. Wear Red Coral. Donate red lentils.

Venus.description: Represents love, harmony, relationships and art. Venus governs beauty, pleasure, romance, and material comforts.
Venus.remedies: Wear Diamond or Opal. Donate white clothes on Fridays. Practice gratitude in relationships.

Mercury.description: Represents communication, logic, travel and intelligence. Mercury governs speech, learning, analytical thinking, and commerce.
Mercury.remedies: Wear Emerald gemstone. Chant Vishnu Sahasranama on Wednesdays. Feed green vegetables to cows.

Jupiter.description: Represents wisdom, growth, fortune and knowledge. Jupiter is the great benefic, bringing expansion, luck, and spiritual growth.
Jupiter.remedies: Wear Yellow Sapphire. Visit temples on Thursdays. Respect and serve your teachers and elders.

Saturn.description: Represents discipline, responsibility, boundaries and lessons. Saturn is the taskmaster who teaches through challenges and rewards through perseverance.
Saturn.remedies: Donate black sesame seeds on Saturdays. Chant Shani Mantra. Serve the poor and elderly.

Rahu.description: Represents obsession, illusion, worldly desires, and unconventional paths. Rahu amplifies whatever it touches and creates sudden changes.
Rahu.remedies: Donate to orphanages. Chant Rahu Beej Mantra. Wear Hessonite Garnet (Gomed).

Ketu.description: Represents spirituality, detachment, past-life karma, and liberation. Ketu brings spiritual insight but also confusion and loss.
Ketu.remedies: Donate blankets to the needy. Chant Ketu Beej Mantra. Wear Cat's Eye gemstone.
